message:
feat(core): implement includes field for skill composition

- Add SkillInclude struct with skill, into, prefix, sections, position fields
- Add IncludeTarget enum (Rules, Examples, Pitfalls, Checklist, Context)
- Add IncludePosition enum (Prepend, Append)
- Add includes field to SkillSpec with has_includes() method
- Implement resolve_full() for complete inheritance + composition resolution
- Add detect_full_cycle() for cycle detection across extends and includes
- Add resolve_includes() to apply includes after inheritance resolution
- Add apply_include() helper for merging content into target sections
- Add check_include_conflicts() for ManyIncludes warnings
- Add ResolutionWarning variants: ManyIncludes, IncludedSkillNotFound
- Preserve includes from child during inheritance merging
- Add comprehensive unit tests for all includes functionality

Resolves: meta_skill-vpn4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
